overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city environment at night, starting in an outdoor neon-lit dining patio, entering a building through metal doors, and exploring a futuristic food court interior with checkered floors and digital signage. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed neon-drenched environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining patio with neon under umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the outdoor seating area toward the building entrance, passing tables and stools

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement showing muscular figure with text 'SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR! ONLY 1€$'
large black patio umbrella with metal base covering round table
continuous purple neon light strip running along low wall edge
red neon sign spelling 'OPEN' above entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk outdoor dining patio at night, illuminated by purple neon railings and a massive glowing billboard advertising 'Set Sail' for 1€$. The camera moves forward past empty tables and stools under large umbrellas, approaching a building entrance with a red neon 'OPEN' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance transition with metal doors

events.description: passing through metal double doors from outdoor patio into interior corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the entrance doors into the building interior

entered.detail: brushed metal double doors with small rectangular windows, reflecting neon lights
white tiled wall with promotional posters and menu boards

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the entrance, passing close to the red 'OPEN' neon sign and entering through heavy metal double doors. The lighting shifts from outdoor purple neon to interior artificial light as we transition from the patio into a narrow corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry corridor with pizza restaurant signage

events.description: NPC character walks toward camera and passes by in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the entry corridor as an NPC passes by walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing red cap and jacket, then passing by

entered.detail: large pink and yellow neon sign with pizza slice logo spelling 'PieZ'
cyan neon arrow signs pointing direction on wall
linear fluorescent ceiling lights running length of corridor

segments.scene_description: Inside the corridor, a large glowing 'PieZ' pizza sign dominates the right wall while cyan arrow signs point the way on the left. An NPC in a red cap walks toward the camera and passes by. The corridor leads toward a brighter open space ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large cyberpunk food court with checkered floor and digital screens

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into large open dining hall with checkered floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the main dining area, observing the space and seated patrons at tables

notable_agents.action: seated at round table looking at handheld device
seated with legs crossed, leaning back in chair

entered.detail: blue and yellow checkered tile pattern covering the hall floor
long wooden picnic-style tables with benches arranged in rows
multiple suspended monitors displaying advertisements above the seating area
illuminated service counter with warm orange lighting at the far end
wall-mounted screens showing food menus and promotions

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a large cyberpunk food court with a distinctive blue and yellow checkered floor. Long dining tables fill the center while digital screens hang from the ceiling displaying advertisements. A few NPCs sit at tables on the right side as the camera moves deeper into the hall toward the illuminated bar area in the back.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched outdoor patio into the brightly lit interior of a futuristic food court. It begins by gliding past empty tables and purple neon railings under a massive glowing billboard before approaching a building entrance marked by a red neon open sign. As the camera passes through heavy metal double doors, the outdoor purple glow shifts into artificial interior lighting within a narrow corridor lined with a glowing pizza sign and cyan directional arrows. The scene then expands as the camera moves past a pedestrian in a red cap and enters a large hall featuring a blue and yellow checkered floor and overhead digital advertisements. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the space, moving past seated patrons toward an illuminated bar area in the distance.
